_doc: FROZEN GOLDEN — captured 2026-06-10 from the live WorkflowEventKind class (pre-deletion), F3 lote-1. Deep-equaled against the descriptor-synthesized port in test_lote1_descriptor_equivalence.py.

identity.docs: Append-only journey ledger. One entry per (artifact, phase) pair. Read together as a sequence, they form the trail from discover → reflect for a Roadmap/Epic/Feature. DNA's methodology-agnostic layer — Superpowers / BMAD / Spec Kit all map onto it via the `methodology` field.

phase.description: Which of the five universal phases this entry represents.

parent_ref.description: Anchor doc grouping this entry with siblings. Typically ``Feature/<name>`` or ``Epic/<name>`` — everything in the journey of one Feature has the same parent_ref.

transitioned_from.description: Name of the previous WorkflowEvent in this trajectory (forms a linked list). Optional for the first entry of a trajectory.

seed_from.description: Name of the prior cycle's `reflect` WorkflowEvent that seeded this entry. Set on `discover` entries created via `dna sdlc journey close-cycle` — the ouroboros bite, where reflect's lessons literally feed into the next discover. Distinct from `transitioned_from`: that's the immediate predecessor across phases; this is the cross-cycle inheritance link.

cycle_index.description: 1-based cycle number this entry belongs to. All entries within the same ouroboros loop share the same cycle_index. Incremented when `journey close-cycle` opens the next discover. Backend-explicit alternative to client-side heuristic cycle detection.

closes_cycle.description: True on a `reflect` entry that has been closed by `journey close-cycle` — marks the boundary where the next discover starts cycle N+1. Set automatically; client may use as the explicit cycle delimiter.

ended_at.description: When the agent left this phase. Null while the phase is still active.

methodology.description: Which methodology the agent followed in this phase. ``ad-hoc`` is honest — Studio renders it with a 'no methodology' badge so we can spot where we cut corners.

methodology_artifact.description: Repo-relative path or URL to the methodology's external artifact, when applicable. E.g. ``docs/superpowers/plans/foo-plan.md`` for the Superpowers writing-plans output, ``.specify/foo/plan.md`` for Spec Kit, etc.

skipped_phases.description: Phases jumped over to get to this entry. E.g. discover → build means skipped ['specify', 'plan'] — Studio shows them in muted strikethrough so the trajectory stays honest.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence note about what happened in this phase. Optional — rendered as the entry's tooltip in Studio.

decision_text.description: Back-compat (deprecated): free-text decision on the entry.

rationale.description: Back-compat (deprecated): free-text rationale on the entry.

owner.description: Back-compat (deprecated): legacy owner of the entry.

decisions.description: Back-compat (deprecated): legacy decisions note on the entry.
